plan.name: Sugar Theme + Customer Journey + Admin Components
plan.description:
Three feature areas in one plan:
(1) New "Sugar" theme — cool gray palette, white cards, black accent, rounded corners, subtle shadows.
    Includes adopting existing radius/shadow tokens to replace hardcoded values across all CSS.
(2) Customer Journey component — interactive horizontal swimlane flow with VirtualBPM sample data.
(3) Admin components — adminShell (fixed layout with collapsible sidebar), sectionCard (dashboard
    widget wrapper), settingsPanel (structured settings form). From maranello-admin-components-spec.md.

requirements.description: body.mn-sugar block in themes-base.css with full semantic token set

tasks.title: Adopt radius tokens across CSS
tasks.description:
Replace hardcoded border-radius values with existing var(--radius-*) tokens.
Add --radius-xs: 0.1875rem (3px) to tokens-spacing-type.css for micro-radius.
Mapping: 2-3px -> --radius-xs, 4px -> --radius-sm, 6-8px -> --radius-sm/md,
12px -> --radius-md, 999px -> --radius-pill.
Target: src/css/*.css with hardcoded values (~213 occurrences).
Focus on common 4px/8px/999px. Do NOT add migration comments.
verify: grep -rn 'border-radius:[[:space:]]*[0-9]' src/css/ | grep -v 'var(' | grep -v '50%' | wc -l shows <80

tasks.title: Adopt shadow tokens across CSS
tasks.description:
Replace hardcoded box-shadow rgba values with var(--shadow-*) tokens.
Card shadows -> --shadow-card, modal/dropdown -> --shadow-elevated, overlay -> --shadow-deep.
Skip: signal glows, focus rings, directional panel shadows, inset 3D, keyframes.
Target: ~60 replaceable out of 223. Visual regression baselines will need updating.

tasks.title: Sugar theme base + component overrides
tasks.description:
Create Sugar theme. Runs after T1/T2 so all tokens are adopted.

1. Add body.mn-sugar block in themes-base.css:
   --mn-surface: #E4E4E8, --mn-surface-raised: #FFFFFF, --mn-surface-sunken: #D8D8DC
   --mn-surface-input: #FFFFFF, --mn-surface-hover: rgba(0,0,0,0.04)
   --mn-text: #111111, --mn-text-muted: #767676 (WCAG AA safe), --mn-text-tertiary: #666666
   --mn-text-inverse: #FFFFFF, --mn-text-disabled: #AAAAAA
   --mn-border: #D0D0D5, --mn-border-subtle: rgba(0,0,0,0.06)
   --mn-accent: #000000, --mn-accent-hover: #333333, --mn-accent-text: #FFFFFF
   --mn-hover-bg: rgba(0,0,0,0.04), --mn-active-bg: rgba(0,0,0,0.08)
   --mn-focus-ring: #000000, --mn-focus-ring-offset: #E4E4E8
   Signals: --mn-error: #DC0000, --mn-success: #00A651, --mn-warning: #F59E0B, --mn-info: #448AFF
   Radius: --radius-sm: 0.5rem, --radius-md: 1rem, --radius-lg: 1.25rem, --radius-xl: 1.75rem
   Shadows: --shadow-card: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), --shadow-elevated: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)
   Charts: --chart-default: #000, --chart-bar: #4EA8DE, --chart-axis: #888

2. Section overrides (Avorio pattern):
   body.mn-sugar .mn-section-dark, .mn-section-light, .mn-section-ivory, .mn-card-dark
   body.mn-sugar .mn-table-wrap, .mn-tag, .mn-btn, .mn-input

3. Auto-dark-mode exclusion: add :not(.mn-sugar) to @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) selector

4. Create themes-sugar-components.css: cards, buttons, ghost buttons, tags, tables,
   sidebar, forms, modals, tooltips. Follow Avorio pattern for cool-gray palette.

5. Add @import "./themes-sugar-components.css" to themes.css barrel.

CRITICAL: ALL new hex values (#E4E4E8, #767676, #F59E0B, etc.) must be INSIDE
body.mn-sugar {} block, NEVER in :root {}. Bare :root additions fail check-tokens.sh.

tasks.title: Theme registration + rotary/toggle updates
tasks.description:
1. Add 'sugar' to ThemeMode in src/ts/core/types/component-types.ts
2. Add to BODY_CLASSES and THEME_ORDER in src/ts/core/utils.ts
3. Update ICONS and LABELS in src/ts/theme-toggle.ts (Record<ThemeMode> requires all keys)
4. Update mn-theme-rotary.js WC:
   - Whitelist array: add 'sugar'
   - _applyTheme(): add 'mn-sugar' to classList.remove()
   - _getTheme(): add branch for 'mn-sugar' body class
5. Update localStorage whitelist validation

tasks.title: Customer Journey headless engine + unit tests
tasks.description:
Create src/ts/customer-journey.ts (split to customer-journey-render.ts if >250 lines):
customerJourney(el, phases, opts?) => CustomerJourneyController

Types: JourneyPhase, JourneyEngagement (status: completed|active|pending|blocked,
type: opportunity|contract|ticket|meeting|task), CustomerJourneyOptions, Controller.

DOM: container > phase columns > engagement cards.
Cards: avatar circle + title + status badge + type icon.
SVG overlay for connectors (dashed arrows, var(--mn-info) color, inline style).
AbortController for cleanup. Keyboard: ArrowRight/Left between phases, Up/Down within, Enter to select.
ARIA: container role=list, phases role=group + aria-label, cards role=listitem.

Unit tests: tests/unit/customer-journey.test.ts
- Renders correct phases/cards, keyboard nav fires events, destroy() cleans up, update() re-renders.

tasks.title: Customer Journey CSS + WC + exports
tasks.description:
1. Create src/css/layouts-customer-journey.css (@layer, <=250 lines):
   .mn-journey, .mn-journey__phase, .mn-journey__card (status variants via signal tokens),
   .mn-journey__avatar, .mn-journey__connectors (SVG overlay),
   hover: var(--shadow-elevated), focus: var(--mn-focus-ring).
   Responsive: vertical stack at <=640px. NO hardcoded colors.
   Add @import to src/css/maranello.css barrel.

2. Create src/wc/mn-customer-journey.js:
   Attrs: phases (JSON), selected, layout. Shadow DOM with dist CSS.
   Fires 'select' event. disconnectedCallback calls destroy().

3. Register in src/wc/index.ts (WC_TAGS + registerAll).
4. Export customerJourney from src/ts/index.ts.
5. Add M.customerJourney to src/ts/maranello.ts.
6. Add types to src/ts/core/types/component-types.ts.

tasks.title: adminShell headless component + unit tests
tasks.description:
Create src/ts/admin-shell.ts (split to admin-shell-render.ts if >250 lines):
adminShell(el, opts) => AdminShellController

Types: AdminShellNavItem (id, label, icon, section?, badge?),
NOTE: children (expandable sub-items) descoped to v4.20.0 — ship flat nav only.
AdminShellOpts (sidebar config, collapsible, topBar, onNavigate, initialPage),
AdminShellController (contentEl, setPage, setTitle, collapse, destroy).

Layout: fixed overlay (inset: var(--mn-navbar-height,56px) 0 0 0, z-index: var(--z-modal,1200)), grid with sidebar + content.
Token mapping: use --mn-accent-bg (not --mn-accent-subtle), --mn-text-muted (not --mn-text-secondary),
--mn-error (not --mn-danger), --mn-hover-bg (not --mn-surface-hover for hover states).
Sidebar: header (icon+title+badge), search input with keyboard shortcut, nav sections with icons.
Collapsed mode: 56px sidebar, icons only, labels hidden.
Content: topbar (breadcrumb + title) + scrollable body slot (contentEl).
AbortController for all listeners.
Keyboard: sidebar search focuses on shortcut key, nav items keyboard accessible.
ARIA: sidebar role=navigation, nav items role=menuitem, aria-current on active.

Unit tests: tests/unit/admin-shell.test.ts
- Renders sidebar with nav items, setPage highlights correct item,
  collapse() toggles collapsed class, destroy() cleans up.

tasks.title: sectionCard + settingsPanel headless components + unit tests
tasks.description:
TWO small components (both simple, fit in one task):

A) Create src/ts/section-card.ts:
sectionCard(el, opts) => SectionCardController
Types: SectionCardOpts (title, action?, padding?, variant: default|flat, className?),
Controller (bodyEl, setTitle, setAction).
Output: <section class="mn-section-card"> with header (title + action link) + body slot.
ARIA: role=region, aria-labelledby from title.

B) Create src/ts/settings-panel.ts (split to settings-panel-items.ts if >250 lines):
settingsPanel(el, opts) => SettingsPanelController
Types: SettingsItemType (toggle|text|select|range|radio|info|action|custom),
SettingsPanelSection (id?, title, description?, items), Controller (update, getValues, destroy).
Renders: sections with dividers, each item is label-group + control grid.
Controls: toggle (reuse mn-lever pattern), text input, select dropdown, range slider,
radio group, info display, action button (default/danger variant), custom render slot.
ARIA: each section as fieldset+legend, labels associated with controls, describedby for descriptions.

Unit tests: tests/unit/section-card.test.ts + tests/unit/settings-panel.test.ts
- sectionCard: renders title, bodyEl available, setTitle updates, flat variant has no border
- settingsPanel: renders sections with items, toggle onChange fires, getValues returns current state, destroy cleans up

tasks.title: Admin + Journey CSS + exports
tasks.description:
1. Create src/css/layouts-admin-shell.css (@layer, <=250 lines):
   .mn-admin-shell (grid), .mn-admin-sidebar, .mn-admin-nav-item (with --active),
   .mn-admin-content, .mn-admin-topbar, collapsed mode.
   Responsive: <=640px sidebar off-canvas. All semantic tokens.

2. Create src/css/components-section-card.css (@layer, <=250 lines):
   .mn-section-card (default + flat variants), header, title, action, body.

3. Create src/css/layouts-settings-panel.css (@layer, <=250 lines):
   .mn-settings-panel, .mn-settings-section, .mn-settings-item (grid layout),
   label-group, ctrl, responsive. Responsive: single-column at <=640px.

4. Add all 3 @imports to src/css/maranello.css barrel.
5. Export adminShell, sectionCard, settingsPanel from src/ts/index.ts.
6. Add M.adminShell, M.sectionCard, M.settingsPanel to src/ts/maranello.ts.
7. Add types to src/ts/core/types/component-types.ts.

tasks.title: Demo sections: Customer Journey + Admin Components
tasks.description:
1. Create demo/sections/customer-journey.js (<=250 lines):
   VirtualBPM data — client "Meridian Consulting Group":
   Phase 1 "Lead Generation": Meeting with Marco Bianchi (completed, 2025-09-12),
     Qualification call with Elena Rossi (completed, 2025-09-18)
   Phase 2 "Opportunity": Proposal by Luca Ferretti (completed), Demo with Sara Conti (completed),
     Negotiation with Marco Bianchi (completed)
   Phase 3 "Contract": Draft by Legal (active), Review by Anna Marchetti (pending), Signature (pending)
   Phase 4 "Onboarding": Kickoff (pending), Training (pending), Go-live (pending)
   Phase 5 "Support": Ticket #1001 SLA breach (completed), Ticket #1044 Integration (active)

2. Create demo/sections/admin-components.js (<=250 lines):
   Demo adminShell with 5 nav items (Dashboard, Users, Audit, Settings, Flags).
   Inside content: sectionCard wrapping a sparkline + sectionCard wrapping a dataTable.
   Second view: settingsPanel with Appearance section (theme radio, font range, reduced motion toggle)
   + Danger Zone (reset action button).
   Use realistic VirtualBPM admin context.

3. Register both in demo/index.html section list.

tasks.title: Build + CI + version + visual baselines
tasks.description:
1. Full build via build-digest.sh
2. Update IIFE bundle size gate if needed (tests/unit/build.test.ts + .github/workflows/ci.yml)
3. Constitution checks (250 lines, no emoji, no hardcoded colors, scrub)
4. scripts/check-theme-semantics.sh passes with Sugar theme
5. CHANGELOG.md v4.19.0: Sugar theme, Customer Journey, adminShell, sectionCard, settingsPanel, token adoption
6. package.json version 4.19.0
7. NaSra agent: bump version, add customerJourney + admin components to inventory
8. test-digest.sh --suite unit --no-cache
9. Visual regression baselines update (shadow changes + new theme + new demo sections)
10. git add -f dist/
11. Conventional commit
